evidence: "Loved this holiday movie and was happy to add it to the collection."
"An easy movie that you don't have to think through."
"Great story, moves fast and has lots of excitement and friendship without the undercurrent of sexy as seen in so many current films."

"Funny, but I usually don't like things blowing up or action movies."
"Just a little bit on the boring side unless you are in early grade school."
"You can't go wrong for the fun and the price."
"If you were a fan, you will be left with your hands out wanting to grab more!"
"My daughter went crazy when she first saw Family Matters."
"It is especially enjoyable for a mother-daughter watch and brings back warm memories for those of us who grew up in the sixties."

summary: The user enjoys family-oriented and comedic films, often with simple narratives and fast pacing. They value emotional resonance and shared experiences, particularly in a family context, while showing less concern for production quality.
